<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is a part of dflydev/dot-access-data. * * (c) Dragonfly Development Inc. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Dflydev\DotAccessData\Exception; /** * Thrown when trying to access an invalid path in the data array */ class InvalidPathException extends DataException { }
